query:
SELECT university, major, COUNT(*) as project_count, MAX(expires_at) as expires_at 
FROM scraped_projects 
GROUP BY university, major 
ORDER BY university, major;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w6DdBww2bzwyZZ.root --database hB2F5YxeXakQRcL5WU36Vw --execute SELECT university, major, COUNT(*) as project_count, MAX(expires_at) as expires_at

GROUP BY university, major
